title: Interest decline eases state payment burden
desc: The government's interest payment burden relative to government revenue, even after borrowing 400 billion baht, is unlikely to exceed the level acceptable to credit rating agencies, according to the Finance Ministry.
title_cn: 利率下行缓解政府付息压力
summary_cn: 泰国财政部表示，即使新增借贷 4 百亿泰铢，政府利息支付相对于政府总收入的比例仍将保持在国际信用评级机构认可的水平以内。这一判断反映出最近利率的下降趋势对政府财政支出形成了显著缓解，有利于保持国家债务的可持续性。
desc_original: The government's interest payment burden relative to government revenue, even after borrowing 400 billion baht, is unlikely to exceed the level acceptable to credit rating agencies, according to the Finance Ministry.

title: Govt goes on island clean-up
desc: The government has declared war on the encroachment of public land and the use of Thai nominees to front foreign-owned businesses, starting with Koh Phangan in Surat Thani and at Freedom Beach in Phuket.
title_cn: 政府启动离岛综合整治
summary_cn: 泰国政府对公共土地侵占和外资企业利用泰籍代理人进行掩护的现象展开打击，首批行动在素叻他尼府涛岛（Koh Phangan）和普吉府自由海滩（Freedom Beach）启动。此举针对旅游热点地区的违规经营，加强了对涉旅产业的监管力度。
desc_original: The government has declared war on the encroachment of public land and the use of Thai nominees to front foreign-owned businesses, starting with Koh Phangan in Surat Thani and at Freedom Beach in Phuket.

title: Border trade boosted by flood of electronics
desc: Thailand's border trade with third countries increased by 41.4% year-on-year in March, surpassing 100 billion baht, driven by a substantial rise in electronic product imports, according to the Department of Foreign Trade (DFT).
title_cn: 电子产品进口推升边境贸易
summary_cn: 泰国对外贸易部门（DFT）公布数据显示，泰国与第三国的边境贸易在 3 月份实现同比增长 41.4%，交易额首次突破 100 亿泰铢。此增长主要由电子产品进口的大幅上升所驱动，反映出泰国在东南亚地区贸易枢纽地位的不断巩固。
desc_original: Thailand's border trade with third countries increased by 41.4% year-on-year in March, surpassing 100 billion baht, driven by a substantial rise in electronic product imports, according to the Department of Foreign Trade (DFT).

title: Anutin rejects fake AI audio
desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul dismissed claims circulating in Cambodia that Thailand would reopen border checkpoints, saying a viral audio clip was clearly AI-generated and urged the public not to be misled.
title_cn: 副总理否认重启边界关卡谣言
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）驳斥在柬埔寨流传的关于泰国将重开边境关卡的传言，明确指出该音频系 AI 人工生成，并呼吁公众提高警惕、防范被虚假信息误导。此事凸显了东南亚地区信息安全的日益重要性。
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul dismissed claims circulating in Cambodia that Thailand would reopen border checkpoints, saying a viral audio clip was clearly AI-generated and urged the public not to be misled.

title: Fuel crisis results in fewer flights for Thai pilots
desc: Pilots in Thailand have begun to feel the impact of reduced flights, as some low-cost carriers have announced a 20% cut in allowances and reduced productivity pay to cope with rising operational costs.
title_cn: 燃油危机导致泰国飞行员收入缩减
summary_cn: 泰国航空业受燃料等运营成本上升的影响，部分廉价航空公司（LCC）开始减少航班班次。飞行员薪酬面临调整，津贴被削减 20%，生产力奖励也有所减少。这一现象反映出全球燃料价格波动对东南亚航空业的持续冲击。
desc_original: Pilots in Thailand have begun to feel the impact of reduced flights, as some low-cost carriers have announced a 20% cut in allowances and reduced productivity pay to cope with rising operational costs.

title: Local firms urge high duties on Chinese EVs
desc: Thailand's automotive and auto parts associations are urging the government to impose steep import duties on Chinese battery electric vehicles (BEVs), warning that once the EV3.5 incentive scheme ends, a surge in imports could severely damage the domestic car industry.
title_cn: 泰国车企敦促政府对中国电动汽车征收高关税
summary_cn: 泰国汽车及零部件产业协会要求政府对中国电动汽车（BEV）征收高额进口关税。协会警告称，EV3.5 激励计划结束后，中国电动汽车进口激增可能严重冲击泰国本土汽车业。这反映了泰国汽车产业对低价电动汽车竞争的担忧。
desc_original: Thailand's automotive and auto parts associations are urging the government to impose steep import duties on Chinese battery electric vehicles (BEVs), warning that once the EV3.5 incentive scheme ends, a surge in imports could severely damage the domestic car industry.

title: Why Americans keep coming back to Bangkok’s chaos when they have plenty of their own
desc: Why Americans keep coming back to Bangkok’s chaos when they have plenty of their own Legacy There is a particular kind of American who arrives in Bangkok expecting to be overwhelmed and leaves wondering why they ever thought home made more sense. The city is loud, dense, hot, and entirely indifferent to the orderly expectations most Westerners carry through the door. And yet, consistently, reliably, Americans fall for it. Not despite the chaos, but because of it. New data from cultural intelligence platform Country Navigator shows Thailand ranking as the 10th most searched destination am
title_cn: 美国人为何一再被曼谷的混乱所吸引
summary_cn: 根据文化情报平台的数据，泰国排名世界十大最受搜索的目的地之一。许多美国游客被曼谷繁忙、拥挤、炎热却充满活力的城市氛围所吸引，甚至超过对故乡的眷恋。这种吸引力源于曼谷本身的混乱与自由，而非其有序与可控。
desc_original: Why Americans keep coming back to Bangkok’s chaos when they have plenty of their own Legacy There is a particular kind of American who arrives in Bangkok expecting to be overwhelmed and leaves wondering why they ever thought home made more sense. The city is loud, dense, hot, and entirely indifferent to the orderly expectations most Westerners carry through the door. And yet, consistently, reliably, Americans fall for it. Not despite the chaos, but because of it. New data from cultural int

title: Retired French man in Pattaya seeks peace amid alleged harassment by British neighbor
desc: An 85-year-old French resident in Pattaya has lodged a complaint alleging ongoing harassment and intimidation involving a British neighbor, urging authorities to investigate and ensure his safety amid rising tensions in the neighborhood. PATTAYA, Thailand – An 85-year-old French national living in the Nongprue area of Pattaya has sought justice after filing a complaint alleging ongoing harassment and intimidation by neighbors and individuals he claims are linked to influential figures in the area, May 13. The complainant has authorized a representative to lodge a formal complaint with Nongprue
title_cn: 法国退休男子在芭提雅遭邻居骚扰寻求庇护
summary_cn: 一名85岁的法国籍居民在芭提雅 Pattaya 农府区 Nongprue 遭邻居骚扰和威胁。该法国人已正式投诉，指称遭到英国邻居及与当地有影响力人物相关联的人员的骚扰和恐吓，要求当局进行调查并确保其人身安全。

title: Calm Thai man reacts after foreign visitor provokes clash on Pattaya street
desc: A viral video showing a confrontation between a foreign visitor and a Thai man has sparked widespread debate online after an apparent slap led to a brief chaotic clash, with social media users divided over how the situation escalated. PATTAYA, Thailand – A video of a confrontation between a foreign visitor and a Thai man has gone viral on social media, May 13, showing an altercation that escalated into a chaotic scuffle after an apparent provocation and physical contact. The clip, which is around 1 minute and 13 seconds long, was originally posted by a Facebook user and quickly spread online,
title_cn: 泰国男子遭外国游客挑衅 芭提雅街头冲突引热议
summary_cn: 一段外国游客与泰国男子在芭提雅街头发生冲突的视频在社交媒体走红。视频显示对方挑衅并发生身体接触，最终演变成短暂混乱的争执。该视频在 Facebook 发布后迅速传播，网友对冲突升级原因看法不一。

title: Residents welcome effort to keep Pattaya sidewalks clear and safe
desc: Pattaya continues its campaign to keep public spaces clear and orderly, removing objects blocking sidewalks and shared areas as part of ongoing efforts to improve cleanliness, safety, and walkability across the city, with residents offering mixed feedback and suggestions for further enforcement. PATTAYA, Thailand – City officials have continued their campaign to keep public spaces clean, safe, and orderly under the ongoing initiative “You Block It, We Remove It,” aimed at clearing sidewalks and shared areas of unauthorized obstructions. The campaign is part of continued policy implementation b
title_cn: 芭提雅居民欢迎人行道清洁安全行动
summary_cn: 芭提雅城市管理部门继续推行「你堵我清」运动，清理人行道和公共区域的违法占用物品。该举措旨在改善城市的清洁、安全和可行性。居民对此行动反响参差不一，并提出进一步的执法建议。
desc_original: Pattaya continues its campaign to keep public spaces clear and orderly, removing objects blocking sidewalks and shared areas as part of ongoing efforts to improve cleanliness, safety, and walkability across the city, with residents offering mixed feedback and suggestions for further enforcement. title: Pattaya Walking Street incident leaves Indian tourist dead, police investigating cause
desc: Tragedy struck Pattaya’s Walking Street as an Indian tourist was found unresponsive at a nightlife venue and later pronounced dead, with police now investigating the exact cause of the sudden death. PATTAYA, Thailand – Shock swept through Walking Street after an Indian tourist was found unresponsive and later pronounced dead inside an entertainment venue early on May 12. At around 03.30, the Sawang Boriboon received an emergency report of a foreign tourist collapsing inside a nightlife venue on Walking Street. Rescue teams, along with doctors from Pattaya City Hospital, were urgently dispatche
title_cn: 芭提雅步行街事件导致印度游客身亡，警方调查死因
summary_cn: 一名印度游客在芭提雅步行街（Walking Street）的夜生活场所内突然晕迷，经本地救援队和芭提雅城市医院医生的紧急救治后仍不幸身亡。事件发生于5月12日凌晨约3点半。警方已启动调查，试图确定这起突发死亡事件的确切原因，引发外国游客安全关注。
desc_original: Tragedy struck Pattaya’s Walking Street as an Indian tourist was found unresponsive at a nightlife venue and later pronounced dead, with police now investigating the exact cause of the sudden death. title: Chonburi tourism leaders back visa-free review, say shorter stays won’t hurt Pattaya
desc: Tourism and hotel leaders in Chonburi say shortening Thailand’s visa-free stay period would not hurt Pattaya’s tourism industry, arguing that most genuine visitors stay only one to two weeks anyway. PATTAYA, Thailand – Tourism leaders in Chonburi and eastern Thailand have voiced support for plans to review Thailand’s 60-day visa-free stay policy for foreign visitors, arguing that shorter or country-specific stay periods would better reflect real tourist behavior and help prevent abuse of the system. President of the Federation of Tourism Associations of Chonburi, Thanet Supornsahasrungsi said
title_cn: 春武里旅游领袖支持免签政策审查，认为缩短停留期不影响芭提雅
summary_cn: 春武里及东部泰国的旅游和酒店行业领袖表示支持审查泰国60天免签政策，认为缩短停留期对芭提雅旅游业影响不大，因为真正游客通常仅停留1-2周。春武里旅游协会联合会主席指出，调整免签政策能更准确反映游客实际行为，有助于防止制度滥用，有利于旅游产业的健康发展。
desc_original: Tourism and hotel leaders in Chonburi say shortening Thailand’s visa-free stay period would not hurt Pattaya’s tourism industry, arguing that most genuine visitors stay only one to two weeks anyway. title: Thai woman arrested at Suvarnabhumi after returning from U.S. over ex-girlfriend theft case
desc: A Thai woman returning from the United States was arrested at Suvarnabhumi Airport over allegations she took property belonging to her former girlfriend after a breakup and moved it out of their shared home. PATTAYA, Thailand – Economic Crime Suppression Division officers arrested a Thai woman at Suvarnabhumi Airport after she returned to Thailand from overseas in connection with an alleged theft case involving property belonging to her former partner. The suspect, identified only as Pansawan, 42, was detained at the international arrivals immigration checkpoint under an arrest warrant issued
title_cn: 泰国女性从美国返泰后在素万那普被捕，涉前女友财产纠纷
summary_cn: 42岁泰国女性潘萨旺（Pansawan）从美国返回后在素万那普机场（Suvarnabhumi Airport）被经济犯罪压制部门逮捕。她被控在与前女友分手后，非法移走共有房产中属于前伴侣的财产并搬出住所。警方凭逮捕令进行追捕，案件性质涉及财产权纠纷和非法侵占。
desc_original: A Thai woman returning from the United States was arrested at Suvarnabhumi Airport over allegations she took property belonging to her former girlfriend after a breakup and moved it out of their shared home. title: Pattaya Mayor fires back at corruption claims, defends city’s transformation
desc: Pattaya Mayor Poramet Ngampichet defended his administration against corruption criticism, saying controversial projects linked to the city predated his tenure while highlighting major infrastructure, tourism, and smart city upgrades carried out over the past four years. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya Mayor Poramet Ngampichet has issued a lengthy public response defending the city administration after criticism from Thanathorn Juangroongruangkit, who described Pattaya as “a monument to corruption” during a political debate earlier this year. The comments referenced controversial projects includin
title_cn: 芭提雅市长反驳腐败指控，为城市改革成果辩护
summary_cn: 芭提雅市长波拉美（Poramet Ngampichet）发表长篇声明为市政府反驳腐败批评。他指出与城市相关的争议项目多早于其四年任期之前，强调市政府在基础设施、旅游促进及智慧城市建设等领域取得的重大成就。此前政治人物坦那通将芭提雅称为「腐败纪念碑」，引发公众争议。
desc_original: Pattaya Mayor Poramet Ngampichet defended his administration against corruption criticism, saying controversial projects linked to the city predated his tenure while highlighting major infrastructure, tourism, and smart city upgrades carried out over the past four years. title: 2,500 eyes on Pattaya as city expands CCTV network to watch over crowds, traffic and emergencies
desc: Pattaya has expanded its smart surveillance network to more than 2,500 CCTV cameras, while increasing public real-time access through Pattaya Connect as officials aim to improve safety, traffic management, and emergency response across the city. PATTAYA, Thailand – As one of Thailand’s busiest tourism cities, Pattaya faces constant pressure from heavy traffic, large crowds, festivals, nightlife activity, and emergencies that can happen at any moment. From road accidents and congestion to overcrowded event zones and urgent public safety incidents, city officials say rapid response has become in
title_cn: 2500只「眼睛」守护芭提雅，城市扩展智能监控网络
summary_cn: 芭提雅已将智能监控网络扩展至2500多台闭路电视摄像头，并通过芭提雅连接（Pattaya Connect）平台增加公众实时访问权限。作为泰国最繁忙旅游城市，芭提雅面临交通堵塞、人群拥挤、活动密集和突发安全事件等持续挑战。该监控扩展计划旨在提升城市安全、优化交通管理并加强应急响应能力。
desc_original: Pattaya has expanded its smart surveillance network to more than 2,500 CCTV cameras, while increasing public real-time access through Pattaya Connect as officials aim to improve safety, traffic management, and emergency response across the city. title: Before Pattaya wakes, boat crews battle the sea to keep tourism alive
desc: While tourists see paradise, Pattaya’s boat operators face early mornings, rough seas, and daily uncertainty to keep the city’s marine tourism running — as officials push upgrades to Bali Hai Pier and promote year-round tourism growth. PATTAYA, Thailand – For many visitors, the sea is a place to relax. But for Pattaya’s boat operators, the sea is work, responsibility, and survival. Behind the smiles of tourists heading to beaches and islands is a group of workers who begin their days long before sunrise. They check the sky, monitor winds and waves, study tides, and assess weather conditions be
title_cn: 黎明前的搏斗：芭提雅船队维持海上旅游业
summary_cn: 在芭提雅，船队工人每天天未明就出海，面对风浪和天气的挑战，为这个旅游城市的海上旅游业保驾护航。官方正推进芭堤雅海滨码头（Bali Hai Pier）升级，促进全年旅游发展。这些船队工人用早起和辛劳，支撑着游客眼中的「海上天堂」。

title: Thai pub guard arrested at gas station after bottle attack and near-fatal stabbing of customer
desc: A pub security guard accused of smashing a bottle over a customer’s head and stabbing him multiple times during a late-night restaurant brawl in Pathum Thani has been arrested at a gas station after weeks on the run. PATHUM THANI, Thailand – Thai crime suppression police have arrested a pub security guard accused of brutally attacking a customer with a glass bottle and knife during a violent clash at a restaurant in Pathum Thani province. The suspect, identified as Phonthep, was arrested at a gas station in Sam Khok district under a warrant issued by the Thanyaburi Provincial Court on charges
title_cn: 酒吧保安砸瓶持刀伤人 逃亡数周后加油站落网
summary_cn: 巴吐他尼府一酒吧保安与顾客发生冲突，用玻璃瓶砸伤对方头部，随后用刀片进行多次刺伤，事态严重。嫌疑人Phonthep逃离现场后躲藏数周，最终在三考县一加油站被警方侦破并逮捕。法院已对其发出逮捕令，指控严重伤害罪。此案凸显了泰国部分夜间场所的安全管理问题。
desc_original: A pub security guard accused of smashing a bottle over a customer’s head and stabbing him multiple times during a late-night restaurant brawl in Pathum Thani has been arrested at a gas station after weeks on the run. PATHUM THANI, Thailand – Thai crime suppression police have arrested a pub security guard accused of brutally attacking a customer with a glass bottle and knife during a violent clash at a restaurant in Pathum Thani province. The suspect, identified as Phonthep, was arrested at a ga

title: Omens bode well, except for rain
desc: The annual Royal Ploughing Ceremony forecast lower rainfall for 2026 after the Lord of the Plough selected a six-span cloth during the traditional divination ritual, signalling possible drought conditions in some areas of Thailand.
title_cn: 皇家耕地典礼预示2026年降雨不足 泰国面临干旱风险
summary_cn: 泰国年度皇家耕地典礼（Royal Ploughing Ceremony）是传统农业占卜仪式。今年典礼中，「耕种之神」选择了六幅布料进行占卜，预示2026年泰国降雨量可能低于平年水平。这一传统占卜结果显示，泰国部分地区面临潜在干旱风险，相关部门需做好农业和水资源管理准备。
desc_original: The annual Royal Ploughing Ceremony forecast lower rainfall for 2026 after the Lord of the Plough selected a six-span cloth during the traditional divination ritual, signalling possible drought conditions in some areas of Thailand.

title: ‘Overdose led to hospital admission’ of war weapons suspect
desc: The hospital admission of a Chinese man arrested last week in Pattaya with a huge cache of military-grade weapons resulted from an overdose of his own medication, according to the Department of Corrections.
title_cn: 中国籍嫌疑人携军级武器被捕 住院因过量用药
summary_cn: 上周在芭提雅被捕的中国籍嫌疑人被指控非法携带大量军事级武器进入泰国。被捕后该男子曾入院治疗，根据惩教部门解释，其住院系因过量服用自身药物导致，而非与案件相关的其他因素。该案涉及严重的非法军事武器走私问题，引发了对国家安全的关注。
desc_original: The hospital admission of a Chinese man arrested last week in Pattaya with a huge cache of military-grade weapons resulted from an overdose of his own medication, according to the Department of Corrections.

title: Labour minister seeks talks over Korean blacklist
desc: Labour Minister Julapun Amornvivat will hold discussions with representatives from the South Korean embassy this week after Seoul blacklisted Thai workers from four northeastern provinces because of problems with seasonal labourers absconding from their employers.
title_cn: 泰韩劳工谈判启动 东北工人黑名单成焦点
summary_cn: 韩国因泰国东北四府的季节工人大量逃离雇主，将这些地区的泰国劳动者列入黑名单，影响其赴韩工作的合法机会。泰国劳工部长朱拉蓬·阿蒙维瓦特（Julapun Amornvivat）将在本周与韩国大使馆代表进行正式磋商。双方希望通过对话找到解决方案，恢复两国劳工合作的信任基础。
desc_original: Labour Minister Julapun Amornvivat will hold discussions with representatives from the South Korean embassy this week after Seoul blacklisted Thai workers from four northeastern provinces because of problems with seasonal labourers absconding from their employers.

title: 中国女星舞台造型刷屏，竟出自泰国公主设计
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 上周六，中国超人气女星赵露思在曼谷IMPACT Arena举办首次个人演唱会，现场座无虚席，社交平台热度迅速冲上中泰双榜。 Screenshot 但比舞台更“出圈”的，是她的多套演出造型。 其中最受关注的一套，并不是来自国际奢侈品牌，而是来自一个更具象征意义的名字——泰国王室时尚品牌 SIRIVANNAVARI。 SIRIVANNAVARI由泰国思蕊梵公主殿下亲自设计，长期被视为泰国高端时尚体系的代表。 在这次赵露思的舞台造型中，品牌以极具识别度的设计语言出现——灵感来自高级定制工坊（Atelier）的工具元素，将卷尺、缝纫针等细节符号转化为时尚语言。 这些原本“幕后”的工具，被重新设计成饰品与视觉元素，在舞台灯光下呈现出强烈的现代感与艺术张力。 结果是直接的：一套造型，同时在中国与泰国社交媒体上引发讨论。 除了服装之外，赵露思另一套白色短裙造型的珠宝配饰，同样来自SIRIVANNAVARI。 同样的设计语言再次出现——以“卷尺”为灵感的戒指与手镯，将“创作过程”本身变成设计主体。 这种表达方式，让泰国时尚第一次以更“设计语言化”的方式，被亚洲年轻观众重新注意到。 很多人第一次意识到泰国品牌的“时尚属性”，可能是从红毯开始的。 例如泰国设计师品牌 POEM，以强调女性曲线与高级剪裁著称，多次被中国女星穿上红毯，包括迪丽热巴、刘诗诗、倪妮等。 它代表的是一种“优雅结
title_cn: 中国女星舞台造型刷屏，竟出自泰国公主设计
summary_cn: 中国女星赵露思在曼谷IMPACT Arena举办演唱会，其舞台造型出自泰国思蕊梵公主设计的同名品牌SIRIVANNAVARI。该品牌设计以高级定制工坊的工具元素为灵感，将卷尺、缝纫针等转化为时尚符号，在舞台灯光下呈现现代感与艺术张力。这套造型同时在中泰社交媒体引发热议，让泰国时尚品牌首次以「设计语言化」方式被亚洲年轻观众重新认识。

title: Officials say foreigners own only 6% of Koh Pha Ngan following locals’ concerns
desc: Officials say foreigners own only 6% of Koh Pha Ngan following locals’ concerns Legacy The director of Thailand’s Land Department stated that foreign nationals own only six percent of land on Koh Pha Ngan, following growing concerns among residents about increasing foreign influence on the island. Concerns intensified in recent years as the number of long-stay foreign residents, particularly Israeli nationals , has increased on Koh Pha Ngan. Some locals fear the island could gradually fall under foreign control as overseas investors purchase land and establish businesses that compete wit
title_cn: 官方回应：外国人仅拥帕南岛6%土地
summary_cn: 泰国土地部门主任表示，外国人仅拥有帕南岛（Koh Pha Ngan）约6%的土地。该声明回应当地居民担忧——近年长期居留的外国人数量大幅增加，尤其以色列国民居多，引发居民对岛屿逐渐落入外国控制的忧虑。官方通过数据澄清试图纾解当地社区不安情绪。
desc_original: Officials say foreigners own only 6% of Koh Pha Ngan following locals’ concerns Legacy The director of Thailand’s Land Department stated that foreign nationals own only six percent of land on Koh Pha Ngan, following growing concerns among residents about increasing foreign influence on the island. title: 泰国AWC战略调整 宣布暂缓曼谷摩天楼项目
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月13日,据泰媒报道，在全球经济仍充满波动、市场节奏不利于投资的背景下，许多企业纷纷调整投资计划，就连大型企业也不例外。泰国地产与酒店巨头Asset World Corp（AWC）承认，未来将更加谨慎投资，并决定暂缓建设此前曾宣布、计划打造为曼谷新地标的100层超高层建筑。 AWC总裁瓦拉帕表示，鉴于全球经济波动及各种不确定性因素，AWC今后将根据市场节奏逐步推进投资，综合考虑市场机会与合适时机，保障投资回报。不过，公司仍维持未来5年1000亿泰铢的投资预算，相当于平均每年投入100-200亿泰铢，但每年的具体投资规模将有所不同。 目前，公司正通过“AWC成长资金”模式管理开发中的项目。待项目投入运营并实现良好业绩后，再注入AWC主体，降低建设期间的成本确认压力。当前共有4个核心项目纳入该基金，包括：Asiatique河滨夜市项目、纽约雅典娜广场酒店、Okura Thonglor项目，以及另一个即将纳入投资组合的新项目。 今年公司投资预算为80亿泰铢，主要用于开发新项目。其中，酒店业务方面，AWC已推进曼谷雅典娜广场Nobu酒店及水疗中心项目，计划于明年年底开业。随后还将推出丽思卡尔顿品牌项目，计划布局于普吉、芭堤雅以及湄南河畔的Lhong 1919文创园。 与此同时，公司还将重点收购市场现有项目并进行升级改造，以提升资产价值。成功案例之一是普吉的普吉万豪酒店项
title_cn: 泰国AWC战略调整 宣布暂缓曼谷摩天楼项目
summary_cn: 泰国地产酒店巨头Asset World Corp（AWC）因全球经济波动及不确定性因素，宣布暂缓建设原定为曼谷新地标的100层超高层建筑。公司维持未来5年1000亿泰铢投资预算，年均投入100-200亿泰铢，重点转向酒店业务（Nobu酒店、丽思卡尔顿品牌）及现有项目收购升级，以分散建设期压力。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月13日,据泰媒报道，在全球经济仍充满波动、市场节奏不利于投资的背景下，许多企业纷纷调整投资计划，就连大型企业也不例外。泰国地产与酒店巨头Asset World Corp（AWC）承认，未来将更加谨慎投资，并决定暂缓建设此前曾宣布、计划打造为曼谷新地标的100层超高层建筑。 AWC总裁瓦拉帕表示，鉴于全球经济波动及各种不确定性因素，AWC今后将根据市场节奏逐步推进投资，综合考虑市场机会与合适时机，保障投资回报。不过，公司仍维持未来5年1000亿泰铢的投资预算，相当于平均每年投入100-200亿泰铢，但每年的具体投资规模将有所不同。 目前，公司正通过“AWC成长资金”模式管理开发中的项目。待项目投入运营并实现良好业绩后，再注入AWC主体，降低建设期间的成本确认压力。当前共有4个核心项目纳入该基金，包括：Asiatique河滨夜市项目、纽约雅典娜广场酒店、Okura Thonglor项目，以及另一个即将纳入投资组合的新项目。 今年公司投资预算为80亿泰铢，主要用于开发新项目。其中，酒店业务方面，AWC已推进曼谷雅典娜广场Nobu酒店及水疗中心项目，计划于明年年底开业。随

title: Lumpini公园广场舞爆红 泰国探索体育旅游新赛道
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月12日,据泰媒报道，每天傍晚，Lumpini公园广场挤满泰国民众和外国游客的画面，已经不只是一个爆红网络的运动现象，而是一个值得继续观察的旅游经济信号。因为那里聚集着城市居民、游客、内容创作者以及品牌方，他们共同出现在一个容易进入、轻松有趣、不必动作标准也能参与的公共空间里。即便跟不上动作节奏，也能和旁边的人一起大笑；不跳舞的人，也可以站着观看、拍视频。这正是某些体育活动从健康行为逐渐转变为城市体验的起点。 根据WGSN发布的《2027关键趋势:体育旅游》报告，体育旅游市场在2025年已占全球旅游支出的约10%，并预计到2032年增长至1.3万亿美元。其中一个推动因素，是2027至2028年间密集举行的大型赛事，包括女足世界杯和2028洛杉矶奥运会。 但真正的转折点，并不只在大型赛事本身，而是游客行为的改变。如今，很多人前往一座城市，不只是为了观看比赛，而是为了感受主办城市氛围、进入粉丝聚集区体验现场文化、结识有相同兴趣的人、亲自参与运动活动。从马拉松、HYROX到各种户外运动，越来越多人把运动体验本身作为旅行理由。 简单来说，体育正在从旅行中的活动变成让人决定出发旅行的原因。有人会因为跑步路线选择城市；有人会因为训练方便程度选择酒店；也有人愿意额外付费购买冰浴和桑拿等赛后恢复服务。如今，假期不一定意味着静态休息，而可能意味着挑战自己、获得值得分享的故事或成为
title_cn: Lumpini公园广场舞爆红 泰国探索体育旅游新赛道
summary_cn: Lumpini公园广场舞成为泰国城市旅游现象。据WGSN《2027关键趋势：体育旅游》报告，体育旅游市场在2025年已占全球旅游支出约10%，预计到2032年增长至1.3万亿美元。游客行为转变为主动参与运动体验、融入当地文化，泰国以广场舞等日常体验为切入点，开拓体育旅游新赛道。

title: Online hair dye leaves Ratchaburi man with severe allergic reaction
desc: Online hair dye leaves Ratchaburi man with severe allergic reaction Legacy A man in Ratchaburi has warned others to carefully check hair dye products after he suffered a severe allergic reaction from a hair dye he bought online that left his scalp irritated, his face swollen, and fluid leaking from the dyed area. The case was shared on Facebook by a user named Khun Weng Khao Tom Pla Zing Ratchaburi, who posted that the hair dye caused severe itching , burning and swelling after he applied it. The post included a video showing his head wrapped in bandages as fluid was still leaking from the aff
title_cn: 网购染发剂致拉差布里男子严重过敏反应
summary_cn: 拉差布里一男子使用网购染发产品后发生严重过敏反应，导致头皮瘙痒灼烧、面部肿胀及液体渗漏，已用绷带包扎。患者通过社交媒体分享经历，警告消费者谨慎检查网购美发产品质量成分，防范不合格产品带来的健康风险，提醒民众对在线美容产品加强甄别。
desc_original: Online hair dye leaves Ratchaburi man with severe allergic reaction Legacy A man in Ratchaburi has warned others to carefully check hair dye products after he suffered a severe allergic reaction from a hair dye he bought online that left his scalp irritated, his face swollen, and fluid leaking from the dyed area. The case was shared on Facebook by a user named Khun Weng Khao Tom Pla Zing Ratchaburi, who posted that the hair dye caused severe itching , burning and swelling after he applied it. Th

title: 泰国布局大棋：5T战略+SUBCON平台抢占产业红利
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 泰国投资促进委员会（BOI）正积极提振本国工业界信心，依托“SUBCON Thailand 2026”展会推出“5T”战略框架，旨在推动泰国经济应对全球格局变革，并加快本土企业、特别是中小企业（SMEs）融入全球供应链体系。在全球制造业加速转移与产业结构深刻调整的背景下，泰国正着力抢占新一轮发展机遇。 5月13日，泰国财政部长艾尼提在“SUBCON Thailand 2026”展会上表示，当前全球正面临重大变局，包括地缘政治、能源安全、环保标准以及人工智能技术的迅速崛起，这些因素正在快速改变工业领域的竞争格局。但与此同时，这也成为泰国吸引投资、推动本国产业升级的重要机遇。 泰国依托其强大的制造业基础、具备潜力的零部件供应网络、完善的基础设施，以及作为区域战略枢纽的地理优势，持续展现出投资吸引力。这一趋势也体现在BOI的投资申请数据持续攀升上：2025年投资申请总额超过1.8万亿泰铢，而2026年第一季度已突破1万亿泰铢，创下历史新高。然而，关键挑战在于推动泰国工业适应全球经济新方向，特别是在数字技术转型、人工智能与清洁能源快速发展的背景下，同时还需同步提升劳动力技能，并推进制度改革以进一步优化投资环境。 在推动经济发展的战略方面，泰国政府提出“5T”框架，包括：精准配置资源（Target）、向新经济体系转型（Transition）、推动经济结构全面升级以实现更广泛
title_cn: 泰国投资促进委员会 5T 战略框架与 SUBCON 平台推动产业融合发展
summary_cn: 泰国投资促进委员会（BOI）推出「5T」战略框架，旨在推动泰国产业应对全球格局变革。该框架包括精准配置资源、向新经济体系转型等内容，通过 SUBCON Thailand 2026 展会推动中小企业融入全球供应链。2025 年投资申请总额超 1.8 万亿泰铢，2026 年首季突破 1 万亿泰铢。面临的主要挑战包括推动产业数字化、提升劳动力技能和优化投资环境。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 泰国投资促进委员会（BOI）正积极提振本国工业界信心，依托“SUBCON Thailand 2026”展会推出“5T”战略框架，旨在推动泰国经济应对全球格局变革，并加快本土企业、特别是中小企业（SMEs）融入全球供应链体系。在全球制造业加速转移与产业结构深刻调整的背景下，泰国正着力抢占新一轮发展机遇。 5月13日，泰国财政部长艾尼提在“SUBCON Thailand 2026”展会上表示，当前全球正面临重大变局，包括地缘政治、能源安全、环保标准以及人工智能技术的迅速崛起，这些因素正在快速改变工业领域的竞争格局。但与此同时，这也成为泰国吸引投资、推动本国产业升级的重要机遇。 泰国依托其强大的制造业基础、具备潜力的零部件供应网络、完善的基础设施，以及作为区域战略枢纽的地理优势，持续展现出投资吸引力。这一趋势也体现在BOI的投资申请数据持续攀升上：2025年投资申请总额超过1.8万亿泰铢，而2026年第一季度已突破1万亿泰铢，创下历史新高。然而，关键挑战在于推动泰国工业适应全球经济新方向，特别是在数字技术转型、人工智能与清洁能源快速发展的背景下，同时还需同步提升劳动力技能，

title: 泰国无人机使用规则大改，5月17日起正式实施
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 泰国政府将提升无人机监管标准，自2026年5月17日起实施新规，要求相关人员必须接受培训、完成注册，并通过线上系统申请飞行许可，以支持无人机在商业应用及未来技术领域的安全发展。 5月13日，泰国政府副发言人拉丽达表示，泰国民航局已发布新公告，针对重量不超过25公斤的无人机操作与放飞人员调整相关许可规则，使其区别于2015年交通部旧有规定，旨在提升飞行安全标准，并应对更复杂的无人机应用场景。新规将于2026年5月17日正式生效。 与2015年旧规相比，新规的主要变化包括： 1.旧规不强制培训，新规要求操作者必须在一年内完成民航局认可的培训课程； 2.旧规无无人机登记制度，新规要求每架无人机必须注册并标注编号； 3.旧规无需每次申请飞行许可，新规要求提交飞行计划并获批准后方可飞行； 4.许可证有效期由两年延长至五年，但需提前至少30天续期； 5.旧规以纸质申请为主，新规全面转为线上系统办理； 6.保险要求维持不变，第三方责任保险赔偿额度仍为每次不低于100万泰铢。 对于已在旧规下获批的用户，可继续使用原有许可至到期。但若涉及新规中的“特定类别”飞行活动，则必须按照新标准补充相关手续。 拉丽达表示，政府支持无人机在数字经济、创新、农业、创意媒体及新兴商业领域的应用，但必须建立在安全、国际标准以及对社会负责的基础之上，以共同构建可持续的技术应用信任体系。 （编译：WAN）
title_cn: 泰国无人机监管新规 5 月 17 日生效，增加培训注册和线上许可要求
summary_cn: 泰国民航局发布新规，自 2026 年 5 月 17 日起实施。新规要求重量不超过 25 公斤的无人机操作者完成民航局认可的培训、无人机必须注册、需提前申报飞行计划获批许可。许可证有效期由两年延长至五年。相比 2015 年旧规，新规更严格规范，已获批用户可继续使用原许可。政府鼓励无人机在数字经济、农业等创新领域应用，但需符合安全和国际标准。

title: Thai taxi drivers accused of paying monthly bribes to escape traffic penalties
desc: Thai taxi drivers accused of paying monthly bribes to escape traffic penalties Legacy Taxi drivers and the Taxi Network Trade Association alleged that some drivers paid bribes to police in exchange for being allowed to park in a prohibited zone while waiting for passengers. The accusations were first raised by the Facebook page Thai Taxi Association, which claimed taxi drivers operating at Ginza Curve in the Rangsit area paid monthly bribes to local officers to avoid fines and legal action for obstructing public roads. According to the page, drivers who allegedly paid the money displayed speci
title_cn: 泰国出租车司机涉嫌每月贿赂警察逃避交通处罚
summary_cn: 泰国出租车驾驶员和行业协会被指在曼谷 Rangsit 区 Ginza Curve 地区禁停区违规停靠等客，每月向当地警察支付贿赂以逃避罚款和法律处罚。泰国出租车协会 Facebook 页面首次公布此事，称部分司机通过支付贿赂获得违规停靠「特权」。此举违反公共道路规定，引发对执法廉正性和行业监管的质疑。

title: American FBI suspect detained in Chiang Mai over US warrant
desc: American FBI suspect detained in Chiang Mai over US warrant Legacy An American suspect was detained in Chiang Mai yesterday, May 12, after Thai police received information from the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) that he was wanted in the United States for assault and stalking . The American, identified as 58 year old Joseph Frances Chinnock, also known as Joseph Kelly, was wanted on a US arrest warrant. The FBI reportedly described him as a serious threat with alleged behaviour involving sexual stalking and harassment of children and women. The US warrant relates to three counts of assa
title_cn: 美国 FBI 通缉犯在清迈被拘留
summary_cn: 58 岁美国男子 Joseph Frances Chinnock（别名 Joseph Kelly）5 月 12 日在清迈被泰国警方拘留。此人因涉嫌猥亵儿童、跟踪骚扰妇女等严重性罪行被美国 FBI 通缉。美国司法部门对其出具逮捕令，指控其对多名儿童和妇女进行了性骚扰、跟踪和骚扰行为，FBI 将其列为严重威胁人物，涉嫌多项性暴力罪名。

title: Thai neighbours seeks help for Burmese girl abused by mother
desc: Thai neighbours seeks help for Burmese girl abused by mother Legacy Thai residents in Chachoengsao sought help for a 13 year old Burmese girl after alleging she had been repeatedly abused by her mother at their home. The case came to public attention after neighbours contacted social media influencer Chalida “Ton Or” Palamart to assist the girl, identified as Namwhan. Officials from the Chachoengsao Provincial Shelter for Children and Family accompanied Ton Or to the family’s home yesterday, May 12. During the visit, Ton Or observed that Namwhan had a shaved head and visible injuries to her he
title_cn: 泰国邻居救助遭母虐待的缅甸女孩
summary_cn: 恰差恩绍府（Chachoengsao）13 岁缅甸女孩 Namwhan 遭母亲长期虐待。邻居求助社交媒体网红 Chalida「Ton Or」Palamart 介入，恰差恩绍府儿童与家庭福利保护中心官员于 5 月 12 日前往其家中。工作人员发现女孩剃头、身体有明显伤痕和虐待迹象。此案反映出跨境弱势群体的保护问题，涉及儿童权益和家暴防治工作。

title: Royal Thai garments take centre stage at Paris exhibition
desc: Royal Thai garments take centre stage at Paris exhibition Legacy A Royal Thai dress exhibition has opened in Paris under the patronage of Princess Sirivannavari Nariratana Rajakanya, presenting royal garments , Thai textiles and contemporary designs at the Musée des Arts Décoratifs . The exhibition, La Mode en Majesté: Royal Thai Dress From Tradition to Modernity , opened today, May 13, and will run until November 1, 2026, in Paris, France. Photo via HRH Princess Sirivannavari Nariratana Rajakanya It is organised through cooperation between the Sustainable Arts and Crafts Institute of Thailand
title_cn: 泰国皇家服装闪耀巴黎艺术装饰展
summary_cn: 由诗丽吉娜瓦蕊公主赞助，「雍容华贵：从传统到现代的泰国皇家服装」展览在巴黎艺术装饰博物馆开幕，展出皇家服装、泰国纺织品和当代设计，展期至2026年11月1日。此举展现泰国文化的国际魅力，并通过可持续手工艺促进全球文化交流。
desc_original: Royal Thai garments take centre stage at Paris exhibition Legacy A Royal Thai dress exhibition has opened in Paris under the patronage of Princess Sirivannavari Nariratana Rajakanya, presenting royal garments , Thai textiles and contemporary designs at the Musée des Arts Décoratifs . The exhibition, La Mode en Majesté: Royal Thai Dress From Tradition to Modernity , opened today, May 13, and will run until November 1, 2026, in Paris, France. title: 泰国内阁批准修改外国人经营法，进一步开放8类业务吸引外资
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月12日，泰国内阁会议正式批准修改《1999年外国人经营法》相关法律原则，进一步开放外国投资，吸引国际资本进入泰国市场。 泰国政府将对《外国人经营法》附表相关条例进行修订，允许外国投资者在泰国从事农产品期货交易业务。只要交易涉及在泰国境内实际交割农产品，即可无需再申请外国人经营许可证。此前，此类业务属于《外国人经营法》第三类限制行业，外国企业必须申请许可。新规实施后，若通过泰国期货交易中心进行交易，并在泰国仓库完成实物交割，将被列为豁免行业。 与此同时，内阁还批准了相关部级条例草案，允许外国投资者直接经营以下8类业务，无需再申请经营许可： 1. 电信服务业务； 2. 资金管理中心业务； 3. 行政管理、人力资源及信息技术管理服务业务； 4. 仅限于国内债务担保服务业务； 5. 出租部分场地用于安装金融服务电子设备及自动售货或服务设备，以为公司员工提供服务及便利的业务； 6. 石油钻探服务业务； 7. 根据证券及证券交易法规定的其他业务； 8. 提供代理、交易、顾问或资金管理服务的业务，涉及的期货合约商品或参考变量不受《2003年期货交易法》约束，属于外国人无需申请许可即可经营的范畴。 从积极方面看，此次政策调整显示泰国正在进一步开放外资市场，有利于外国企业在泰国设立区域总部。金融、科技、能源等行业将明显受益，有助于泰国成为东南亚金融服务与大宗商品交易中心。与此同
title_cn: 泰国内阁批准修改《外国人经营法》开放8类业务吸引外资
summary_cn: 泰国内阁5月12日批准修订《1999年外国人经营法》，进一步开放外国投资。放宽农产品期货交易限制，允许外资在泰国进行实物交割无需许可。同时批准8类行业无需申请许可证即可由外资直接经营，包括电信、资金管理、人力资源、能源等。此举有利于吸引国际资本，推动泰国成为东南亚金融与商品交易中心。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月12日，泰国内阁会议正式批准修改《1999年外国人经营法》相关法律原则，进一步开放外国投资，吸引国际资本进入泰国市场。 泰国政府将对《外国人经营法》附表相关条例进行修订，允许外国投资者在泰国从事农产品期货交易业务。只要交易涉及在泰国境内实际交割农产品，即可无需再申请外国人经营许可证。此前，此类业务属于《外国人经营法》第三类限制行业，外国企业必须申请许可。新规实施后，若通过泰国期货交易中心进行交易，并在泰国仓库完成实物交割，将被列为豁免行业。 与此同时，内阁还批准了相关部级条例草案，允许外国投资者直接经营以下8类业务，无需再申请经营许可： 1. 电信服务业务； 2. 资金管理中心业务； 3. 行政管理、人力资源及信息技术管理服务业务； 4. 仅限于国内债务担保服务业务； 5. 出租部分场地用于安装金融服务电子设备及自动售货或服务设备，以为公司员工提供服务及便利的业务； 6. 石油钻探服务业务； 7. 根据证券及证券交易法规定的其他业务； 8. 提供代理、交易、顾问或资金管理服务的业务，涉及的期货合约商品或参考变量不受《2003年期货交易法》约束，属于外国人无需申请许

title: Becky Rebecca进军国际舞台 多重身份亮相戛纳
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月13日,泰国演员、歌手Becky Rebecca Patricia Armstrong将于今年前往法国参加第79届戛纳国际电影节（5月12-23日）。 此次，Becky将以多重身份亮相电影节活动。她受开云集团邀请，将于5月14日出席“跃动她影”晚宴预热活动。5月15日，她还将参加来自瑞士的高端咖啡品牌雀巢举办的活动和派对。同一天，粉丝们还将看到她以巴黎欧莱雅品牌大使身份现身戛纳红毯，展现优雅造型。 粉丝可于5月14日至15日期间，通过话题#RebeccaxCannes2026关注她此次重要亮相。 （编译：hansa；审核：wan；） The post Becky Rebecca进军国际舞台 多重身份亮相戛纳 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 泰国演员Becky Rebecca多重身份亮相戛纳电影节
summary_cn: 泰国演员、歌手Becky Rebecca Patricia Armstrong将于5月14-15日参加第79届戛纳国际电影节，以多重身份亮相。她受开云集团邀请出席「跃动她影」晚宴预热活动，参加雀巢高端咖啡品牌的活动和派对，并以巴黎欧莱雅品牌大使身份现身红毯展现优雅造型。粉丝可通过#RebeccaxCannes2026话题关注她的重要亮相时刻。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月13日,泰国演员、歌手Becky Rebecca Patricia Armstrong将于今年前往法国参加第79届戛纳国际电影节（5月12-23日）。 此次，Becky将以多重身份亮相电影节活动。她受开云集团邀请，将于5月14日出席“跃动她影”晚宴预热活动。5月15日，她还将参加来自瑞士的高端咖啡品牌雀巢举办的活动和派对。同一天，粉丝们还将看到她以巴黎欧莱雅品牌大使身份现身戛纳红毯，展现优雅造型。 粉丝可于5月14日至15日期间，通过话题#RebeccaxCannes2026关注她此次重要亮相。 （编译：hansa；审核：wan；） The post Becky Rebecca进军国际舞台 多重身份亮相戛纳 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: 泰国严打地方势力 要求各旅游区严格执法
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月13日,据泰媒报道，根据泰国总理兼内政部长阿努廷指示，内政部次长阿努西签署最高紧急传真命令，要求全国各府府尹在地方层面持续、严格、认真执法，维护社会秩序，保障民众权益，并营造安全、适宜的旅游环境。 相关措施共分为5项，包括： 1.县长、副县长、地方治安志愿队成员以及地方行政组织，与各区警察指挥部、各府警察局、移民局、国家安全机构、各府就业办公室和相关部门加强联动合作，在各自辖区内严密监控、检查并严格执法，尤其针对重点旅游区域。 2.所有级别公务人员依法、公正、廉洁履职。如发现违法行为，无论是泰国公民还是外国人，都必须依法严厉处理，不得存在任何区别对待或宽容放纵。 3.强化预防与打击各类违法行为，包括非法务工、马甲公司、毒品交易、危害国家安全行为、地方势力与黑社会行为、武器犯罪、赌博和人口贩运。 4.加强对经营者与游客的宣传教育，要求其尊重泰国法律、文化、传统与民众生活方式，同时彰显“高质量、负责任”的旅游形象。 5.要求各地密切关注辖区动态，一旦发现可能影响社会秩序、国家安全或国家形象的事件，必须立即向内政部报告，并迅速采取措施解决问题。 此前，阿努廷已亲赴普吉，督办解决公共海滩及国有土地被侵占问题，普吉Bang Tao海滩地区地方势力问题。 （编译：hansa；审核：wan；来源：ch7hdnews） The post 泰国严打地方势力 要求各旅游区严格执法
title_cn: 泰国严打地方势力 要求旅游区严格执法维护秩序
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷指示内政部严打地方势力。内政部次长阿努西签发紧急命令，要求全国各府加强跨部门执法合作，重点整治旅游区。措施包括严格监控地方势力、非法务工、毒品交易、武器犯罪、人口贩运等违法行为，同时向经营者和游客宣传尊重泰国法律和文化。此前总理已亲赴普吉处理海滩侵占和黑社会问题。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月13日,据泰媒报道，根据泰国总理兼内政部长阿努廷指示，内政部次长阿努西签署最高紧急传真命令，要求全国各府府尹在地方层面持续、严格、认真执法，维护社会秩序，保障民众权益，并营造安全、适宜的旅游环境。 相关措施共分为5项，包括： 1.县长、副县长、地方治安志愿队成员以及地方行政组织，与各区警察指挥部、各府警察局、移民局、国家安全机构、各府就业办公室和相关部门加强联动合作，在各自辖区内严密监控、检查并严格执法，尤其针对重点旅游区域。 2.所有级别公务人员依法、公正、廉洁履职。如发现违法行为，无论是泰国公民还是外国人，都必须依法严厉处理，不得存在任何区别对待或宽容放纵。 3.强化预防与打击各类违法行为，包括非法务工、马甲公司、毒品交易、危害国家安全行为、地方势力与黑社会行为、武器犯罪、赌博和人口贩运。 4.加强对经营者与游客的宣传教育，要求其尊重泰国法律、文化、传统与民众生活方式，同时彰显“高质量、负责任”的旅游形象。 5.要求各地密切关注辖区动态，一旦发现可能影响社会秩序、国家安全或国家形象的事件，必须立即向内政部报告，并迅速采取措施解决问题。 此前，阿努廷已亲赴普吉，
